recommendations.title: Prioritize editor hiring to unblock video production
recommendations.description: 2 validated video ideas are ready for production (95 and 88 viral scores) but blocked by lack of editors. Current bottleneck: Upwork billing method not added. 30 freelancers invited, 10 proposals received, top candidates identified.
recommendations.consensusNotes: High impact, low effort fix. Unblocks $500+ in video production pipeline.

recommendations.title: Investigate Seedance 2.0 for multi-shot video workflow
recommendations.description: New ByteDance tool offers native multi-lens storytelling and audio generation. Could reduce production time by 30-40% compared to current Higgsfield+Kling pipeline.
recommendations.consensusNotes: Promising but unproven. Recommend test project before full adoption.

recommendations.title: Scale evolution-themed content based on 676x outlier
recommendations.description: Pokemon evolution stages video hit 676x viral score. Your T-Rex evolution video is already in production (idea-001). Queue 2-3 additional evolution videos to capitalize on proven format.
recommendations.consensusNotes: Strong signal from outlier research. Low risk given validation data.

recommendations.title: Monitor NVIDIA earnings (Feb 26) for investment signal
recommendations.description: NVDA reports Feb 26. Current position: 0 shares. Consider entry if earnings beat and guidance strong. Alternative: CRWV (CoreWeave) for AI infrastructure exposure.
recommendations.consensusNotes: Optional opportunity. Not urgent given existing AAPL/BTC holdings.
